pi_items.source: Task instructions explicitly request configuring port 8080, which is also verified by export_result.sh checks.
Task instructions request saving files to ~/fdsnws_test/, which expands to /home/ga/fdsnws_test for the ga user. Verified in export_result.sh.
Task instructions specify these exact filenames for saving the curl command outputs, and export_result.sh checks for their existence and content.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring the SeisComP fdsnws module to run on port 8080 and serve event, station, and waveform data. The underlying data is real seismic data from the 2024 Noto Peninsula earthquake (USGS) and GEOFON stations. The expected output directory is /home/ga/fdsnws_test, which must contain the queried files: events.xml, stations.xml, and dataselect_version.txt.
